text: We've raised $25 million, building the world's best customer feedback AI that notion,
perplexity, canva, webflow, hinge, linear, already use.
I'm recording this for Nikita and Elon to help X become the greatest app of all time,
and it'd been an honor to help. Let me show you how.
Right now, ideas and complaints are everywhere.
Tweets, app reviews, support tickets, Reddit, and more.
Step one, Enterprise AI ingests all feedback and categorizes it into a five-level taxonomy.
When someone says, my card is getting declined at the checkout page,
one complaint can refer to multiple product issues, so Enterprise passes them out.
It knows that the L1 is billing, L2 is subscription management,
L3 is checkout with themes like checkout flow errors.
This is done for millions of feedback records automatically in real time.
Step two, the quality monitor agent sends slack alerts to the correct team when something breaks.
Teams stay in touch with feedback through an escalation agent that flags frustrated premium users' feedback.
The news feed agent sends weekly metric reports for each team's focus area, and custom agents too.
Step three, Nikita can deep research what's blocking premium signups in India.
Instant answer.
Payment failure, Prime Error 402 affects 43% of Indian users on HDFC and ICICI bank cards.
X already listens to Grok, but Grok is generative and undeterministic,
without category-specific memory to identify trends.
Enterprise structures millions of monthly active users' feedback into X's actual product architecture.
A living knowledge graph, we've saved millions of dollars for Notion, Webflow, and Proplexity through our AI.
If you're a product with 250k users, Enterprise will save you $1 million guaranteed on mis-engined engineering,
user churn, and critical errors.
With Enterprise, X can fix its top issues in just 30 days.
We've already created an instance of Enterprise for X, and I'll personally fly down to XHQ to show you how Nikita and Elon.
